ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "API endpoint not found", "path": attributes.requestPath, "method": attributes.method }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "transactions": [ { "id": "txn-001", "accountId": "acc-001", "date": "2024-03-24T10:30:00Z", "description": "Grocery Store Purchase", "amount": -125.67, "currency": "CAD", "type": "Purchase", "category": "Groceries" }, { "id": "txn-002", "accountId": "acc-001", "date": "2024-03-23T14:15:00Z", "description": "Salary Deposit", "amount": 3200.00, "currency": "CAD", "type": "Deposit", "category": "Income" }, { "id": "txn-003", "accountId": "acc-002", "date": "2024-03-22T09:45:00Z", "description": "Online Transfer", "amount": 500.00, "currency": "CAD", "type": "Transfer", "category": "Transfer" } ] }

logger.doc:name: Log Balance Request
logger.message: Getting balance data with OAuth integration

logger.doc:name: Log Token Available
logger.message: OAuth tokens available, making real API call to bank

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "requestId": uuid(), "timestamp": now() as String, "scopes": ["ACCOUNT_BASIC"] }

logger.doc:name: Log API Call
logger.message: Making authenticated API call to TD Bank with access token (length: #[sizeOf(vars.accessToken)]), session: #[vars.sessionId]

logger.doc:name: Log No Auth
logger.message: No valid OAuth tokens available. Error: #[payload.error default 'unknown'], returning fallback data
